overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit wooden walkways, graffiti-covered walls, and massive holographic advertisements. The scene transitions from a quiet tree-lined path past street vendors into a covered corridor with digital billboards, ending in an open plaza with towering building-sized displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy pedestrian walkway with graffiti wall

events.description: passing by NPCs sitting on benches along the graffiti-covered wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden pathway through the rain, passing seated pedestrians on the right

notable_agents.action: sitting on a bench against the graffiti-covered wall

entered.detail: tall cylindrical lamps emitting bright teal light along the left side
tall concrete wall covered in green and white graffiti tags
wet wooden planks with striped patterns reflecting neon lights
large stairs leading up to upper level with bright light at top
tall leafy trees lining the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a cyberpunk city, walking along a wooden pathway illuminated by teal neon lampposts. To the right, a concrete wall covered in graffiti runs parallel to the path, where a few NPCs sit on benches. Tall trees line the left side, and ahead, a bright staircase structure is visible in the distance.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway toward the distant city lights and commercial area

entered.detail: glowing advertisements and building lights visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along an empty section of the wooden promenade, having passed the graffiti wall and seated pedestrians. The trees on the left are now closer, and distant neon signs of the commercial district become visible ahead as the camera moves forward through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: street vendor area with food stalls

events.description: exiting wooden walkway onto concrete plaza with vendor stalls
passing under bright white neon sign reading REAL WATER

agents.ego_description: walking past food vendor stalls with bright signage and canopies

notable_agents.action: standing near a food stall with a bright illuminated canopy

entered.detail: small stall with bright white canopy and warm artificial lighting
large illuminated sign with text REAL WATER in white neon
wet concrete ground replacing the wooden planks

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the wooden walkway to a concrete plaza featuring street vendor stalls. A prominent REAL WATER sign glows on the right as the camera passes food stalls with bright canopies. The ground changes from wood to wet concrete, and the area feels more commercial with overhead structures providing partial shelter from the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with digital advertising screens

events.description: entering covered corridor with walls of digital billboards on both sides
ambient light shifts to purple from surrounding digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow corridor lined with glowing digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera carrying a red umbrella

entered.detail: large digital screen displaying CIRRUS advertisement in blue and red colors
metal framework and roof covering the pedestrian path
multiple screens showing various advertisements and video content

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered pedestrian corridor where the environment becomes darker and more enclosed. The walls are lined with bright digital billboards including a prominent CIRRUS advertisement. The lighting shifts to purple hues from the screens. A pedestrian with a red umbrella walks toward the camera as it moves through the tunnel-like structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with building-sized holographic advertisements

events.description: exiting covered corridor into open plaza with massive building-sized digital displays

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza surrounded by towering digital advertisements on building facades

notable_agents.action: walking across the wet plaza holding an umbrella

entered.detail: massive curved digital screens covering building facades showing colorful abstract graphics and advertisements
wet tiled surface reflecting the multicolored neon lights from above
tall palm trees silhouetted against the bright building displays

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered corridor into a vast open plaza where massive holographic displays cover the surrounding building facades. The wet tiled floor creates mirror-like reflections of the colorful neon advertisements. Palm trees are visible on the right, and pedestrians with umbrellas walk through the rain-soaked commercial square.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy cyberpunk city, transitioning from a quiet, tree-lined promenade into a dense, neon-saturated commercial plaza. It begins on a wooden pathway illuminated by teal neon lampposts, moving past a graffiti-covered wall and seated pedestrians toward a distant bright staircase. As the camera advances through the rain, the wooden path gives way to a wet concrete plaza filled with street vendor stalls and a glowing REAL WATER sign. The scene then shifts into a dark, enclosed pedestrian corridor where the lighting turns purple under the glow of digital billboards and a pedestrian with a red umbrella passes by. Finally, the camera exits the tunnel into a vast open square, where massive holographic displays tower over the building facades and reflect vividly across the rain-soaked tiled floor.
